violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. -Both inspector and establishment temp. measuring devices were used. -Establishment shall use 3-bay to sanitize until unit is adjusted or repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. -Observed back door has small gap at bottom right hand corner. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Dishwasher taken out of service at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The dishwasher located in the back area was not in good repair. Dishwasher taken out of service at the time of inspection. PIC to use 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment and utensils until dishwasher is repaired/serviced/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
